title: Array Pattern - Two Sum
content:
def two_sum(nums, target):

    seen = {}   # store number : index

    for i, num in enumerate(nums):

        diff = target - num

        # check if the required number already exists
        if diff in seen:
            return [seen[diff], i]

        # otherwise store the number
        seen[num] = i

Step-by-Step Example

nums = [2,7,11,15]
target = 9

Step 1

num = 2
diff = 9 - 2 = 7

seen = {2:0}

Step 2

num = 7
diff = 9 - 7 = 2

2 already exists in seen

So we found the pair.

return [0,1]

Example Run

nums = [2,7,11,15]
target = 9

print(two_sum(nums, target))

Output

[0,1]
